REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT HILDELISA JOHNSON'S MOTION TO STRIKE. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. COMPLAINT PROPERLY STATES A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF THE CC&RS AGAINST THE DEFENDANT (NOT THE DECEDENT). FACTUAL ISSUES RAISED IN THE ARGUMENT REGARDING THE 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION ARE NOT PROPER ON A MOTION TO STRIKE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HARRY L. JACOBS, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Continued To May-21-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HILDELISA JOHNSON'S MOTION TO STRIKE

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's Motion to Strike Amended Complaint is DENIED, 10 days to answer. Complaint properly states a cause of action for breach of the CC&Rs against the Defendant (not the decedent). Factual issues raised in the argument regarding the 2nd and 3rd causes of action are not proper on a motion to strike. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harry L. Jacobs, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/HLJ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Continued To Apr-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT HILDELISA JOHNSON , ADMINISTRATOR OF ESTATE OF THOMAS C JOHNSON DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. First Amended Complaint on file. No declaration of compliance with meet and confer requirements on file.
